privileged_info_summary: Task 'create_loyalty_promotion@1' requires creating a Drupal Commerce promotion in the synthetic test environment with specific configuration. The promotion name 'Loyal Customer Reward - $20 Off' (verified), display name '$20 Off Orders Over $100' (verified), offer type 'order_fixed_amount_off' (verified as real Drupal Commerce plugin ID), fixed discount amount $20.00 (verified), minimum order condition $100.00 (verified), customer usage limit of 3 (verified), total usage limit of 500 (verified), automatic application without coupon requirement (verified), and assignment to 'Urban Electronics' store (verified as the default store created in environment setup). The verifier checks all these properties through database queries extracting serialized PHP configuration. All metadata values are consistent with task description requirements and Drupal Commerce schema.
